title: The application of a novel Cas12a nuclease aligned CRISPR system in Ulva prolifera
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"yzmbu","text":"The protocol describes a novel CRISPR Cas12a-aligned gene-editing system in the green seaweed Ulva prolifera. It has 3 main steps: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7p24e","text":"1. Gamete induction and collection by phototaxis. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a5jrv","text":"2. CRISPR genome editing RNP assembly and delivery by modified Polyethene Glycol (PEG) 4000 system. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fiasl","text":"3. Mutant screening by 2-fluoroadenine (2-FA).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"xvmq3","text":"Sorbitol (TCI S0065)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rxpp8","text":"0.5M Tris-HCl pH 7.5","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qul9t","text":"1M CaCl2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vihq7","text":"PEG 4000 (Wako)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qk81n","text":"PEG 8000 (MPbio)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"v6cng","text":"2-Fluoroadenine (TCI F0647)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kxnsi","text":"EnGen sgRNA Synthesis Kit (NEB #E3322S),","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"sowd0","text":"Monarch RNA Clean up Kit (NEB #T2040)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wab0t","text":"Cas9 Nuclease (NEB #M0646T)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aypxa","text":"crRNA (IDT)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rqil7","text":"ST8","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1hfok","text":"AsCas12a (IDT 1081068)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kgos4","text":"Distilled water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare the Low Salinity Buffer: Sorbitol 1.822 g Distilled water 8.7 mL 1x PES medium 1 mL 0.5M Tris-HCl pH 7.5 200 µL 1M CaCl2 100 µL

The gametes are collected by phototactic migration after cells are obtained by centrifugation at 5,000 g for 5 min at 20°C. Finally, resuspend thoroughly in Low Salinity Buffer at a density of 1.0×10^^4 per µL.

For CRISPR/Cas9 Genome Editing: Mix 1 µL crRNA+1 µL tracrRNA and incubate at 95°C for 5 min as the synthetic sgRNA. After cooling down, Cas9 proteins are added to the synthetic sgRNA and incubated at 37°C for 5-10 min to make the CRISPR RNP complexes.
For CRISPR/AsCas12a and ST8 Genome Editing: Mix 1 µL dissolved crRNA with AsCas12a/ST8 (3.34 µmol/µL), then incubate at room temperature for 10-20 min as the CRISPR RNP complexes.

Prepare the Transformation Buffers: 40% PEG 4000: PEG 4000 4 g Distilled water 10 mL 40% PEG 4000 with CaCl2: PEG 4000 4 g Distilled water 9.7 mL 0.5M Tris-HCl pH 7.5 200 µL 1M CaCl2 100 µL Final concentration: 10mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 10mM CaCl2, 40% PEG 4000. 60% PEG 4000: PEG 4000 6 g Distilled water 10 mL 40% PEG 8000: PEG 8000 4 g Distilled water 10 mL 60% PEG 8000: PEG 8000 6 g Distilled water 10 mL Prepare the reaction as following: Gametes 100 µL 60% PEG or UTB2 (Prefer 60% PEG) 100 µL CRISPR RNP complex 2.5 µL Gently mix the reagents and incubate at room temperature for 30 min. Centrifuge at 5,000 × g for 5 min and remove the supernatant. Wash the gametes with filtered seawater and centrifuge at 5,000 g for 5 min to obtain the pellet. Resuspend the pellet in 1/2 PES and add to a 60 mm dish. Incubate the dish at 20°C in the dark for 36-48 hours before 2-FA treatment.

The 1/2 PES medium was removed, and the selection medium (10 uM 2-FA) was added to the dish and cultured for 2-3 weeks; change the selection medium every week. Transfer the 2-FA-resistant thalli to 1/2 PES medium for the following experiments and change the medium every week.
creator: Zheng Qin
